## Result: CLEAN ✓

The code is clean and secure. It correctly implements:
- Ed25519 Signing/Verification via @noble/ed25519
- Deterministic Canonicalization for all signing contexts
- Proper Error Handling (catch blocks return false, not throw)
- No key generation weaknesses
- No signature bypasses
- No leakage risks
- No nonce reuse issues (Ed25519 is deterministic)
- No randomness issues
